name: China Tangshang Holdings Limited
summary: China Tangshang Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in exhibition-related, property sub-leasing, property development and investment, food and beverages, and financial services businesses in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company is involved in organizing various exhibition and meeting events; and sub-leasing and developing real estates, as well as leasing investment properties. It also engages in the sale of food and beverages; operates restaurants; and provision of loans to individuals and corporations. The company was formerly known as Culture Landmark Investment Limited and changed its name to China Tangshang Holdings Limited in August 2017. China Tangshang Holdings Limited is based in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong. China Tangshang Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Grand Nice International Limited.
